trigger.reason: Meta's Pocket is a new AI product release targeting gaming/interactive content generation, meeting all trigger criteria and likely to draw broad market attention that could trigger sympathy-fade selling in adjacent sectors.

primary_event.headline: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
primary_event.summary: Meta has launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts. This represents a new product entry into AI-assisted content creation and gaming, positioned as a consumer-facing AI capability.

secondary_events.headline: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket

discovery.trigger_acknowledgment: Analyzed Meta's launch of Pocket, a vibe-coded AI gaming/mini-games app targeting consumer content creation.
discovery.run_summary: The Meta Pocket launch is a consumer AI gaming/creative tool with essentially zero substantive overlap with any of the candidate names on today's tape. The moves being analyzed (semi-cap names down sharply, vertical SaaS names up) look driven by broader tech-tape dynamics, not Pocket-related sympathy fade. The most interesting setups are AEIS and ONTO — semi-cap names down double digits on filings that explicitly identify them as AI infrastructure beneficiaries.

discoveries.name: Advanced Energy Industries, Inc
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K explicitly states: 'infrastructure investments in artificial intelligence ("AI") have increased substantially, which is driving significant demand increases in the Data Center Computing market. We accelerated investments to increase capacity...to support higher demand.' AEIS is a direct AI capex beneficiary supplying power conversion for data centers.
discoveries.thesis: A consumer AI gaming app from Meta has no bearing on data-center power-conditioning demand. AEIS's own filings describe AI-driven data center capex as a growth tailwind, not a threat. The sharp drop appears to be broader semi-cap/data-center capex-peak fear rather than any Pocket-related linkage. Curation false-victim hypothesis is confirmed by filing text.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued hyperscaler capex guidance; AEIS design wins in next-gen data center power; management commentary reiterating AI data center growth.
discoveries.what_kills: A hyperscaler capex cut announcement, a major AEIS customer concentration loss, or evidence that AI data center power designs are moving to competitors.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Semi-cap 'picks and shovels' names get swept into any tech sympathy selloff regardless of whether the specific AI event has anything to do with data center hardware — the Meta consumer app trigger illustrates how thematic these fades can be.
discoveries.catalyst: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: AEIS is on the AI-adjacent curated list and moved sharply on a day when broad tech was under pressure from AI-related headlines, though Pocket itself has no operational connection.
research_pointers: Check whether the drop coincides with a broader semi-cap sector move (LRCX, AMAT, KLAC) or is AEIS-specific
Review most recent AEIS Data Center Computing segment revenue growth rate and backlog
Verify no concurrent customer concentration news or hyperscaler capex commentary today

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K positions ONTO as a process control/metrology supplier for advanced semiconductor nodes — a direct beneficiary of AI-chip manufacturing complexity. No filing language suggests any exposure to consumer AI applications or gaming content generation.
discoveries.thesis: A Meta consumer gaming app has zero mechanical connection to semiconductor process-control equipment demand. If anything, AI chip manufacturing requires MORE inspection/metrology, not less. The sharp drop reflects semi-cap sympathy selling on general tech weakness, not any substantive Pocket-related threat. Curation false-victim thesis is confirmed.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued TSMC/Samsung/Intel advanced node capex; ONTO revenue growth in advanced packaging and HBM inspection.
discoveries.what_kills: A major fab capex cut, ONTO customer concentration loss, or the pending Rigaku deal falling apart with negative implications.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Metrology/inspection names are among the most mechanically decoupled from consumer AI product news but still get caught in tech-tape sympathy moves.
discoveries.catalyst: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: ONTO is on the semi-cap AI-adjacent curated list and moved sharply on a broadly weak AI-themed tech tape.
research_pointers: Confirm move is sector sympathy vs. name-specific (compare to KLAC, CAMT)
Check status of pending Rigaku 27% stake acquisition disclosed in 10-Q
Review advanced packaging / HBM inspection exposure commentary from last earnings

discoveries.name: Photronics, Inc.
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K describes PLAB as a photomask supplier where 'demand for photomasks depends primarily on design activity.' Every AI accelerator design requires photomasks. No filing language identifies consumer AI apps or gaming content generation as a competitive threat.
discoveries.thesis: Photomasks are required for every chip manufactured, including AI accelerators. A Meta consumer AI gaming app is orthogonal to this supply-chain step. The modest sympathy drop appears purely thematic. Curation false-victim thesis holds.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued design starts at leading-edge fabs; PLAB order book strength; IC design activity growth.
discoveries.what_kills: A slowdown in chip design activity, loss of a major foundry customer, or export-control escalation targeting PLAB's China operations.
discoveries.catalyst: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: PLAB is on the semi picks-and-shovels curated list and moved on a broadly weak AI-themed tape.
research_pointers: Review PLAB's recent design activity commentary in latest earnings
Check whether move coincides with broader semi-cap sympathy
Verify no export-control or China-specific news today
